title: 桜花賞の後に・灼熱の余韻

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka runs her first race of the Classics and beats
Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both ran with all they had and, in the midst
of an argument, promise to have a rematch.
However... Vodka's next scheduled race is the
long-awaited Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to face her rival, Vodka would have to
give up on the Japanese Derby and continue with
the Japanese Oaks on the Tiara tour instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka is shaken, uncertain as to which path she
should choose.
